title: 10x Multi Listing of Butterfly Pull Bows! 12-50mm PullBows Florist Craft[Purple,50mm Organza Single Bow]
features: These stunning bows are made of translucent organza featuring shiny iridescent striping.
Super wide 50mm ribbon width makes them suitable for bouquets, car ribbons and large gifts.
Choose from a wide variety of colours and different pack sizes.
